concerns.text: FR-001 and SC-001 require measuring the deviation from the nominal target. Task T015 defines the CSV output columns but omits 'deviation_from_nominal', leaving the success criterion unmeasured in the primary artifact.

FR-001 mandates processing 'Wine Quality' datasets. Task T005 lists 'Wine distributions' generically. Without explicit mention of 'Wine Quality' or the specific variant, the task risks omitting a required dataset scope.

FR-004 requires adjustments from '2021 and 2017 literature' (specifically Covington et al. 2021, Karwa & Vadhan 2017). Task T020 cites '2021/2017 literature' generically without a task to verify and implement the exact formulas from these named papers, risking incorrect implementation.

FR-006 requires a sensitivity analysis on 'arbitrary' threshold choices. Task T032 hardcodes specific thresholds (90%, 93%, 95%) without a mechanism to sweep arbitrary values or configure them as hyperparameters, potentially failing the robustness requirement.

FR-003 requires 1,000 bootstrap resamples for *each* noisy dataset to construct CIs. Task T013 describes the loop logic but lacks an explicit instruction to ensure CI construction (T012) is executed for *every* one of the 1,000 outer samples to generate the coverage distribution.
